commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Surely none of the men that came up out of Egypt, from twenty years old and upward, shall see the land which I swore unto Abraham, unto Isaac, and unto Jacob; because they have not wholly followed me: If They shall not see Chanaan. (Menochius) In Scripture, odious things are not fully expressed, particularly in oaths, Psalm lxxxviii. , and cxxxi. (Calmet) Hebrew, "surely none. Because they have not perfectly followed me. "(Grotius) (Haydock).
